allow: Bash(python -c "from app.main import app; print\('OK - app importa sin errores'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(path\) for path in d['paths'].keys\(\) if 'categoria' in path]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\([p for p in d['paths'] if 'categor' in p]\)")

PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Users\\brunin\\Desktop\\RepositorioBaseFoodStore-SDD\\.venv\\Scripts;" + $env:PATH; Set-Location "C:\\Users\\brunin\\Desktop\\RepositorioBaseFoodStore-SDD"; python -c "from app.modules.categorias.router import router; print\([r.path for r in router.routes]\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:PATH = "C:\\Users\\brunin\\Desktop\\RepositorioBaseFoodStore-SDD\\.venv\\Scripts;" + $env:PATH; Set-Location "C:\\Users\\brunin\\Desktop\\RepositorioBaseFoodStore-SDD"; Start-Process -NoNewWindow -FilePath "C:\\Users\\brunin\\Desktop\\RepositorioBaseFoodStore-SDD\\.venv\\Scripts\\uvicorn.exe" -ArgumentList "app.main:app","--reload","--port","8000" 2>&1; Start-Sleep 5; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/openapi.json" -UseBasicParsing\).Content | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(list\(d['paths'].keys\(\)\)\)")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep 3; try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/openapi.json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $response.Content | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(list\(d['paths'].keys\(\)\)\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/openapi.json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "StatusCode: $\($response.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "ContentLength: $\($response.Content.Length\)"; Write-Host "First200: $\($response.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(200, $response.Content.Length\)\)\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\Users\\brunin\\Desktop\\RepositorioBaseFoodStore-SDD"; Start-Process -NoNewWindow python -ArgumentList "-m","uvicorn","app.main:app","--reload","--port","8000"; Start-Sleep 6; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/openapi.json" -UseBasicParsing; $json = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $json.paths.PSObject.Properties.Name)
